indicators.name: Large desk
indicators.rationale: A large desk provides ample space for a computer setup and other work materials.

indicators.name: Good lighting
indicators.rationale: The presence of multiple light sources ensures good illumination for work tasks.

indicators.name: Minimal distractions
indicators.rationale: The open layout and minimal furniture arrangement reduce distractions.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for solo computer work due to its large desk and good lighting, but lacks dedicated seating and could benefit from more privacy.
